user.title: ClimateSync – Source Rooms
user.description: Select the climate entities (rooms) whose temperatures will be used to compute the heating demand.

destination.title: ClimateSync – Destination
destination.description: Select the thermostat that ClimateSync will control, and configure basic settings.

error.no_sources: Please select at least one source climate entity.
error.no_destination: Please select a destination climate entity.
error.dest_is_source: The destination entity cannot be one of the source entities.
